title: Fossil fuel dependence leaves Europe hostage to geopolitical chaos, says Sánchez [Advocacy Lab]
summary_full: As Energy Commissioner Dan Jørgensen urges Europe to refuse Russian energy, WindEurope’s annual event pitches wind energy as the obvious and controllable homegrown solution
